prose: **Frontier-orbital gap of pyridine** — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, no density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied pyridine.xyz, single-point (no optimization). SCF converged in 10 cycles. No warnings reported. HOMO = –7.2525992 eV; LUMO = –1.1127860 eV → gap = **6.1398131 eV**. Command:  `cli.py frontier pyridine.xyz --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout path --out pyridine_frontier_dft.json`
